ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., SS, 2B, DH) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is associated with */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* League the player is playing in */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the player's statistics are for */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the league (e.g., ROK, A(Full)) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number of the player in the draft */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting handedness of the player */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing handedness of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* League the team is playing in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "affiliate" TEXT /* Major league affiliate of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the league (e.g., ROK, A(Full)) */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Shortened version of the league name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics are for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "innings_played" REAL /* Total innings played */,
  "total_chances" INTEGER /* Total chances */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "double_plays" INTEGER /* Number of double plays */,
  "range_factor" REAL /* Range factor (RF) */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage (FPCT%) */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (stored securely) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Position played by the player (e.g., SS, 2B, DH)
Reference to the team the player is associated with
